## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Sydney Go to GrowthX.ai's operations, structure, and current initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai recently implemented a pod structure with managing editors as pod leads, supported by account managers and writers](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [The company is rapidly scaling, hiring full-time writers and account managers to build out pods](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai's differentiator is scaling content at a high quality level, continually refining workflows to address friction points](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Onboarding processes are being improved, with Circle becoming the central hub for training and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Roles

  - [Shifted from account manager model to pod structure in December](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Pods consist of:](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Managing editor (pod lead)](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [1-2 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Writers (currently freelance, moving towards full-time)](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Introducing managing directors to oversee 2-3 pods each](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Kyle's role shifting from direct pod oversight to higher-level management](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Writers' involvement varies by account:](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [Some edit/expand pre-generated content in Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [Others trained to generate articles using GrowthX.ai's workflows](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Account managers typically produce weekly content using workflows](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Strategy development primarily responsibility of managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Continuous experimentation to improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Example: Metadata account needed deeper, more resonant content](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Process: Identify friction points, implement creative solutions, scale quality content](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Goal: Maintain differentiator of scaling high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Onboarding and Training

  - [Current onboarding process needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Moving trainings to Circle platform for better organization](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Airtable used for various processes, but basic understanding sufficient](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Fathom platform stores meeting recordings, transcripts, and summaries](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [AI-powered meeting summaries available for quick insights](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Sydney's Integration

  - [Will likely manage a mix of existing and new accounts](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Potential to take over accounts from departing team member](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Possible involvement in new account starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to provide Sydney access to Circle and confirm Airtable access](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Sydney to review Circle training materials and relevant call recordings](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Kyle and Sydney to schedule follow-up meeting later in the week](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [Sydney to prepare for taking on new accounts (details forthcoming)](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Explore potential for Sydney to train team on competitor gap analysis in the future](https://fathom.video/share/tkoqexa2nffAurrCNuRR_wzFkFbr8Eph?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
